text.title: Research Workflows Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Personas workflow for pre-PMF SaaS
example.note: Mode: personas. Stage: pre-pmf. Consumer: .aidocs/product_docs/personas/. Step 1: user-research-at-scale -> coded transcripts batch (acceptance: N>=10 transcripts, HITL-passed). Step 2: persona-building -> persona-full.md primary + secondary + negative (acceptance: >=5 quotes per persona + kill_criteria present). Total 2 steps (within 6 cap).
